objective: Build and polish the ClawX Electron + React workbench UI with full backend integration.

tasks.title: CORS origin restriction for Host API
tasks.description: Added applyCorsOrigin() to restrict Access-Control-Allow-Origin to trusted Electron renderer origins only. Defense-in-depth on top of session-token auth.

tasks.title: Memory extraction enhancement (rules + LLM judge)
tasks.description: Upgraded memory-extract.ts: additive/subtractive scoring model, LLM result caching (TTL 10min, max 256), borderline detection (0.08 margin), request-style detection, richer LLM context, length-based scoring adjustments.

tasks.title: Backlog verification and closure
tasks.description: Verified P0 #1/#2, P1 #5/#6/#10/#12/#13/#14, P1 test #28/#33, P2 #38 — all previously resolved. Updated Prompt.md to reflect closures.
